code: @Manual{,   title = {RClinVarbitration: Stream ClinVar XML into Relational DuckDB Tables},   author = {Sounkou Mahamane Toure},   year = {2026},   note = {R package version 0.1.1},   url = {https://github.com/sounkou-bioinfo/RClinVarbitration}, }

what: Stream ClinVar XML into Relational DuckDB Tables
title: Stream ClinVar XML into Relational DuckDB Tables
text: RClinVarbitration streams complete official ClinVar VCV XML/XML.GZ release focused relational DuckDB tables. retains public VCV, RCV, SCV, AlleleID, VariationID, disease identifiers instead exposing XML parser coordinates. package-owned native extension uses libxml2 forward reader. import reads gzip XML exactly writes one compact JSON-backed row per selected ClinVar entity disk-backed staging table. projects ordinary ClinVar relations without EAV pivot drops staging. build XML DOM R data frame persist generic XML nodes, edges, element statements. extension uses DuckDB’s C_STRUCT_UNSTABLE interface, package bundles selects exact-version artifacts DuckDB v1.5.0 v1.5.4. Connections must allow locally built unsigned extensions.

title: Stream ClinVar XML into Relational DuckDB Tables
text: clinvar_locations retains every source assembly location, including VCF position, reference, alternate alleles. clinvar_normalized_alleles exposes normalized joins GRCh37, GRCh38, NCBI36; GRCh37 coordinates discarded. release-scale tables retain explicit logical key columns create DuckDB ART indexes: indexes must remain memory-resident poor fit complete analytical release. small completion policy-profile catalogues retain primary keys. executable README requires complete local ClinVarVCVRelease_00-latest.xml.gz, selected CLINVAR_VCV_XML_FILE, explicit immutable release label CLINVAR_RELEASE_ID. substitute bundled one-record regression fixture. file-backed DuckDB holds complete import every following query reuses data rather rescanning XML. Set CLINVAR_DUCKDB_FILE retain reuse completed import across renders; otherwise executable document uses temporary database. first use, rclinvarbitration_enable() installs DuckDB’s official, version-matched JSON extension necessary. connection therefore needs permission download DuckDB extensions ; restricted environment can run INSTALL json connection enabling RClinVarbitration.
code: library(DBI) library(duckdb) library(RClinVarbitration)  clinvar_xml <- Sys.getenv("CLINVAR_VCV_XML_FILE") release_id <- Sys.getenv("CLINVAR_RELEASE_ID") stopifnot(   nzchar(release_id),   file.exists(clinvar_xml),   identical(basename(clinvar_xml), "ClinVarVCVRelease_00-latest.xml.gz") )  clinvar_db <- Sys.getenv("CLINVAR_DUCKDB_FILE") persistent_db <- nzchar(clinvar_db) if (persistent_db) {   dir.create(dirname(clinvar_db), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)   clinvar_db <- normalizePath(clinvar_db, mustWork = FALSE) } else {   clinvar_db <- tempfile("rclinvarbitration-readme-", fileext = ".duckdb") } clinvar_tmp <- paste0(clinvar_db, ".tmp") con <- dbConnect(duckdb(   dbdir = clinvar_db,   config = list(     allow_unsigned_extensions = "true",     memory_limit = Sys.getenv("CLINVAR_DUCKDB_MEMORY_LIMIT", "2GB"),     preserve_insertion_order = "false",     temp_directory = clinvar_tmp,     threads = "2"   ) )) rclinvarbitration_enable(con) rclinvarbitration_init(con) release_sql <- as.character(dbQuoteString(con, release_id)) stored_release <- dbGetQuery(con, paste0(   "SELECT source_path FROM clinvar_releases WHERE release_id = ", release_sql )) count_relations <- c(   variants = "clinvar_variants",   alleles = "clinvar_alleles",   rcv_assertions = "clinvar_rcv_assertions",   scv_assertions = "clinvar_scv_assertions",   conditions = "clinvar_conditions",   observations = "clinvar_observations",   citations = "clinvar_citations",   text = "clinvar_text" ) if (nrow(stored_release)) {   stopifnot(identical(stored_release$source_path, normalizePath(clinvar_xml)))   counts <- vapply(count_relations, function(table) {     dbGetQuery(con, paste0(       "SELECT count(*) AS n FROM ", table, " WHERE release_id = ", release_sql     ))$n[[1L]]   }, numeric(1)) } else {   counts <- rclinvarbitration_import_xml(     con,     clinvar_xml,     release_id = release_id   ) } knitr::kable(   data.frame(relation = names(counts), rows = unname(counts)),   row.names = FALSE )

title: Stream ClinVar XML into Relational DuckDB Tables
text: RCVs disease-specific ClinVar aggregates. remain distinct VCV-level aggregate joined directly classified condition. primary substrate reproducing ClinVarbitration deriving alternative disease-aware policies. Individual SCVs retain disease mappings, submitters, dates, review status, contribution flags. Policy SQL can therefore recompute aggregate per allele disease instead accepting ClinVar’s top-line VCV label. source ClinicalAssertion records assertion type variation disease germline classification; remain queryable clinvar_scv_assertions policy votes, summary excludes SQL-null classifications rather rendering ambiguous NA.
code: disease_summary <- dbGetQuery(con, "   SELECT coalesce(aggregate_classification, '<not classified>') AS aggregate_classification,          aggregate_review_status,          count(*) AS disease_aggregates,          count(DISTINCT disease_identifier) AS identified_diseases   FROM clinvar_disease_aggregates   GROUP BY aggregate_classification, aggregate_review_status   ORDER BY disease_aggregates DESC   LIMIT 20 ") knitr::kable(disease_summary, row.names = FALSE) disease_aggregates <- dbGetQuery(con, "   SELECT vcv_accession, rcv_accession,          disease_database, disease_identifier,          coalesce(disease_name, '<not supplied by ClinVar>') AS disease_name,          aggregate_classification, aggregate_review_status   FROM clinvar_disease_aggregates   WHERE disease_identifier IS NOT NULL   ORDER BY vcv_accession, rcv_accession   LIMIT 12 ") knitr::kable(disease_aggregates, row.names = FALSE) submission_summary <- dbGetQuery(con, "   SELECT classification, review_status,          count(*) AS disease_submissions,          count(DISTINCT submitter_id) AS submitters   FROM clinvar_disease_submissions   WHERE classification IS NOT NULL   GROUP BY classification, review_status   ORDER BY disease_submissions DESC   LIMIT 20 ") knitr::kable(submission_summary, row.names = FALSE)

title: Stream ClinVar XML into Relational DuckDB Tables
text: policy identifier cpg-clinvarbitration-2.2.11, pinned Centre Population Genomics ClinVarbitration 2.2.11 attributed upstream commit. package-local v1 suffix: disease scoping made explicit view name. SQL follows upstream classification bins, 2016 ACMG threshold, 60/20 majority rule, review-star calculation, qualified Illumina benign exclusion, first retained practice-guideline expert-panel submission source order. clinvar_policy_decisions applies logic per allele disease; clinvar_policy_allele_decisions applies per VCV/allele without disease grouping. Unknown classifications vote. post-2015 strong-review evidence exists disease/allele, ordinary older submissions omitted. Additional blinding profiles ordinary rows clinvar_policy_profiles clinvar_policy_submitter_exclusions; selected profile always retained policy output. executable example materializes derived default decisions temporary DuckDB table following summaries recompute policy. clinvar_policy_pathogenic_alleles disease-specific P/LP join surface. retains every source coordinate qualifying allele—including GRCh37 GRCh38—perform VEP PM5.
code: invisible(dbExecute(con, "DROP TABLE IF EXISTS readme_policy_decisions")) invisible(dbExecute(con, "   CREATE TEMP TABLE readme_policy_decisions AS   SELECT * FROM clinvar_policy_decisions WHERE profile_id = 'default' ")) policy_summary <- dbGetQuery(con, "   SELECT policy_classification, gold_stars,          count(*) AS disease_decisions,          sum(retained_submission_count) AS retained_submissions   FROM readme_policy_decisions   GROUP BY policy_classification, gold_stars   ORDER BY disease_decisions DESC ") knitr::kable(policy_summary, row.names = FALSE) pathogenic_examples <- dbGetQuery(con, "   SELECT p.vcv_accession, p.allele_id,          p.disease_database, p.disease_identifier,          coalesce(p.disease_name, '<not supplied by ClinVar>') AS disease_name,          p.gold_stars, n.assembly, n.chromosome, n.position_vcf,          n.reference, n.alternate   FROM readme_policy_decisions p   JOIN clinvar_normalized_alleles n     ON n.release_id = p.release_id    AND n.vcv_accession = p.vcv_accession    AND n.allele_id = p.allele_id   WHERE p.policy_classification = 'Pathogenic/Likely Pathogenic'     AND p.disease_identifier IS NOT NULL   ORDER BY p.vcv_accession, p.disease_key   LIMIT 12 ") knitr::kable(pathogenic_examples, row.names = FALSE)

title: Stream ClinVar XML into Relational DuckDB Tables
text: rclinvarbitration_export_clinvarbitration_parquet() writes seven-column ClinVarbitration decision layout persisted VCV allele-policy view. efficient VCV-derived annotation resource, collapse overwrite distinct source loci AlleleID. algorithm-level reproduction upstream artifact, rclinvarbitration_reproduce_clinvarbitration_parquet() instead consumes matching archived NCBI submission_summary variant_summary files. implements upstream 2.2.11 SQL-equivalent loop without Python, Hail, VEP, PM5. deliberately separate VCV disease policy upstream project uses flat files. archived March 5, 2026 flat files produce 4,125,389 GRCh38 rows. Centre Population Genomics’ March 24, 2026 Zenodo record 19196770, 4,118,490 locus/AlleleID keys shared 1,863 classification star difference. remaining 6,899 candidate-16,865 reference-keys demonstrate Zenodo run used later live flat-file snapshot; recorded differential baseline, claim byte--byte identity across different inputs. tools/compare_clinvarbitration_release.R writes candidate Parquet, non-equal differential Parquet, count summary already-local archived files Zenodo TSV.
code: vcv_parquet <- tempfile("rclinvarbitration-vcv-policy-", fileext = ".parquet") vcv_parquet_info <- rclinvarbitration_export_clinvarbitration_parquet(   con, vcv_parquet, release_id = release_id, assembly = "GRCh38" ) knitr::kable(   data.frame(rows = vcv_parquet_info$rows, assembly = vcv_parquet_info$assembly),   row.names = FALSE ) unlink(vcv_parquet)

title: Stream ClinVar XML into Relational DuckDB Tables
text: normalized allele view join surface downstream Rduckhts/DuckHTS work. RClinVarbitration duplicate VEP PM5. Long assertion explanations remain attributable source SCV. README truncates selected text SQL knitr pad console output width longest ClinVar comment. DuckLake can later retain merged release snapshot, XML ingestion policy semantics remain explicit .
code: alleles <- dbGetQuery(con, "   SELECT assembly,          count(*) AS normalized_alleles,          count(DISTINCT allele_id) AS allele_ids   FROM clinvar_normalized_alleles   GROUP BY assembly   ORDER BY assembly ") knitr::kable(alleles, row.names = FALSE) evidence <- dbGetQuery(con, "   SELECT s.scv_accession, s.submitter_name,          left(t.text, 180) || CASE WHEN length(t.text) > 180 THEN '…' ELSE '' END AS excerpt   FROM clinvar_text t   JOIN clinvar_scv_assertions s     ON s.release_id = t.release_id    AND s.assertion_entity_id = t.scv_entity_id   WHERE t.section = 'comment'   ORDER BY s.scv_accession   LIMIT 8 ") knitr::kable(evidence, row.names = FALSE) DBI::dbDisconnect(con, shutdown = TRUE) if (!persistent_db) {   unlink(     c(clinvar_db, paste0(clinvar_db, ".wal"), clinvar_tmp),     recursive = TRUE,     force = TRUE   ) }

title: Stream ClinVar XML into Relational DuckDB Tables
text: decision policy adapted Centre Population Genomics ClinVarbitration, version 2.2.11 commit 658b9f241eb2d43aa11214b153b19c1e18a16337, MIT license. Teague Sterling’s DuckDB Webbed extension informed initial assessment SQL-native XML ingestion. RClinVarbitration vendor execute Webbed: package-owned libxml2 scan handles official gzip VCV release built supported exact DuckDB engine version.

what: RClinVarbitration: relational ClinVar evidence in DuckDB — RClinVarbitration-package
title: RClinVarbitration: relational ClinVar evidence in DuckDB — RClinVarbitration-package
text: DuckDB-native, XML-first ClinVar store. package-owned native extension streams official .xml.gz VCV releases libxml2 one pass. SQL materializes VCV, allele, location, gene, RCV, SCV, condition, observation, citation, attribute, evidence-text relations; versioned ClinVarbitration policy deliberately derived source records.

what: Enable native ClinVar XML scanning on a DuckDB connection — rclinvarbitration_enable
title: Enable native ClinVar XML scanning on a DuckDB connection — rclinvarbitration_enable
text: Loads package-owned rclinvarbitration extension DuckDB's official JSON extension. latter downloaded DuckDB first use already installed; JSON required project compact parser rows. native clinvar_xml_entities(path) table function compact, ClinVar-specific one-pass staging surface used rclinvarbitration_import_xml(). connection must created duckdb::duckdb(config = list(allow_unsigned_extensions = "true")), locally built DuckDB extension.

title: Enable native ClinVar XML scanning on a DuckDB connection — rclinvarbitration_enable
Enable native ClinVar XML scanning on a DuckDB connection — rclinvarbitration_enable
text: con DuckDB DBI connection. extension_path Optional explicit exact-version extension path.

title: Enable native ClinVar XML scanning on a DuckDB connection — rclinvarbitration_enable
text: con, invisibly.

what: Export an allele-level ClinVarbitration-compatible Parquet file — rclinvarbitration_export_clinvarbitration_parquet
title: Export an allele-level ClinVarbitration-compatible Parquet file — rclinvarbitration_export_clinvarbitration_parquet
text: Writes seven columns Centre Population Genomics ClinVarbitration's clinvar_decisions.tsv: contig, position, reference, alternate, clinical_significance, gold_stars, allele_id. source package's allele-level policy view, disease-level decision view, output row usable locus/alleles annotation record. GRCh37 GRCh38 supported. output retains every qualifying source locus, including distinct X/Y locations one AlleleID.

title: Export an allele-level ClinVarbitration-compatible Parquet file — rclinvarbitration_export_clinvarbitration_parquet
code: rclinvarbitration_export_clinvarbitration_parquet(   con,   path,   release_id,   assembly = c("GRCh38", "GRCh37"),   profile_id = "default" )

title: Export an allele-level ClinVarbitration-compatible Parquet file — rclinvarbitration_export_clinvarbitration_parquet
text: con DuckDB DBI connection initialized rclinvarbitration_init(). path New output .parquet file path. release_id Imported ClinVar release label export. assembly Genome assembly: "GRCh38" "GRCh37". profile_id Policy profile identifier, normally "default".

title: Export an allele-level ClinVarbitration-compatible Parquet file — rclinvarbitration_export_clinvarbitration_parquet
text: named list describing written Parquet file, invisibly.

title: Export an allele-level ClinVarbitration-compatible Parquet file — rclinvarbitration_export_clinvarbitration_parquet
text: file schema-compatible upstream TSV/Hail decision resource, claimed byte--byte equivalent: package derives submissions locations VCV XML, whereas upstream uses ClinVar's tab-delimited submission variant summaries. PM5 deliberately exported; Rduckhts/DuckHTS downstream consequence PM5 processing.

what: Stream a ClinVar VCV XML release into relational DuckDB tables — rclinvarbitration_import_xml
title: Stream a ClinVar VCV XML release into relational DuckDB tables — rclinvarbitration_import_xml
text: native extension reads .xml .xml.gz libxml2 forward reader. One compact JSON-backed row per selected ClinVar entity written disk-backed staging table one XML pass, projected public ClinVar relations without EAV pivot, dropped. XML DOM, XML blob, generic parser-node graph, R data-frame materialization used. public relation committed independently, release catalogue row marks completion, failed imports remove partial rows release_id.

title: ClinVarbitration policy SQL — rclinvarbitration_policy_sql
text: Returns DuckDB views implementing supported policy clinvar_disease_submissions. policy bins submitted classifications, excludes unknown bins upstream qualified Illumina benign exclusion, optionally applies profile-specific submitter exclusions, prefers evidence evaluated 2016 onward always retaining expert-panel practice guideline evidence, applies 60/20 majority rule. disease-level allele-level views reproduce upstream strong-review rule: first retained practice-guideline expert-panel classification source order decisive.

title: ClinVarbitration policy SQL — rclinvarbitration_policy_sql
ClinVarbitration policy SQL — rclinvarbitration_policy_sql
text: policy_version Exact supported policy version. See rclinvarbitration_policy_version().

title: ClinVarbitration policy SQL — rclinvarbitration_policy_sql
text: named character vector DuckDB CREATE REPLACE VIEW statements.

title: ClinVarbitration policy SQL — rclinvarbitration_policy_sql
text: clinvar_policy_pathogenic_alleles disease-specific pathogenic likely-pathogenic join surface downstream Rduckhts/DuckHTS annotation. perform VEP PM5 computation.

title: Current ClinVarbitration policy version — rclinvarbitration_policy_version
text: identifier pins policy semantics adapted Centre Population Genomics ClinVarbitration 2.2.11 (upstream commit 658b9f241eb2d43aa11214b153b19c1e18a16337) records decisions grouped per disease rather per variation. identifier package-local suffix: view names, rather speculative v1, state whether output disease-scoped allele-scoped.

title: Reproduce ClinVarbitration decisions from archived ClinVar flat files — rclinvarbitration_reproduce_clinvarbitration_parquet
text: separate rclinvarbitration_import_xml() disease-aware policy views. exists reproduce differentially validate upstream allele-level artifact matching archived flat-file releases. uses DuckDB's streaming CSV reader SQL aggregation; invoke Python, Hail, VEP, PM5 logic.

title: ClinVar relational schema SQL — rclinvarbitration_schema_sql
text: Returns DuckDB DDL focused ClinVar schema. Public identifiers domain relations retained directly: VCV variants, alleles assembly locations, genes, RCV aggregates, SCV submissions, conditions, observations, citations, attributes, attributable discovery text. XML parser nodes persisted. release catalogue enforces small primary key; release-scale analytical tables expose logical key columns without DuckDB ART indexes complete imports remain memory-bounded.

title: ClinVar relational schema SQL — rclinvarbitration_schema_sql
ClinVar relational schema SQL — rclinvarbitration_schema_sql
text: named character vector SQL statements.

title: RClinVarbitration 0.1.1
text: Load DuckDB’s official JSON extension rclinvarbitration_enable(); install automatically absent, actionable error connection download extensions. Remove premature local v1 policy suffix; preserve pinned cpg-clinvarbitration-2.2.11 identifier, source-order strong-review rule, separate disease- allele-level decision views. Add Parquet exporters VCV-derived allele policy direct, SQL-reproduction ClinVarbitration versioned NCBI flat-file archives, plus retained differential script published Zenodo releases. Retain imported SCV source order deterministic strong-review decisions. Bundle exact C_STRUCT_UNSTABLE extension artifacts DuckDB v1.5.0 v1.5.4, selected enabled connection’s engine version. Replace generic XML node/edge/statement persistence one-pass, ClinVar-specific entity scan focused VCV, allele, location, gene, RCV, SCV, condition, observation, citation, attribute, evidence-text relations. Staging now stores one JSON-backed row per selected entity requires release-wide EAV grouping. Release-scale tables use logical keys without memory-resident ART indexes, projection commits separately; release catalogue marks completion failed imports clean partial rows. Add clinvar_disease_aggregates clinvar_disease_submissions direct RCV- SCV-level disease-policy inputs, canonical disease identifiers selected independently complete retained cross-reference relation. Add cpg-clinvarbitration-2.2.11 SQL policy, configurable submitter-blinding profiles, clinvar_policy_pathogenic_alleles disease-specific P/LP join surface Rduckhts/DuckHTS. Require README execution complete official VCV XML.GZ one file-backed import; displayed summaries query persisted import never rescan XML.

title: RClinVarbitration 0.1.0
text: First public release. Added package-owned DuckDB C extension clinvar_xml_statements(path), single-threaded libxml2 forward scan ClinVar VCV XML XML.GZ releases. Added semantic SQL materialization ordered XML nodes, edges, literals, discovery text, real NCBI VCV XML.GZ fixture. first artifact supports exactly DuckDB v1.5.3 Unix-like hosts; fails closed engine versions.
